mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sdate desc, ymdhms desc, barcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.sdate, a.factory, c.subname_ch as car, b.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.loginid, a.barcode, a.ymdhms, substr(ymdhms,9,2)||':'||substr(ymdhms,11,2) as time FROM t_wms_defective a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY rn

SELECT a.sdate, a.factory, c.subname_ch as car, b.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.loginid, a.barcode, a.ymdhms, substr(ymdhms,9,2)||':'||substr(ymdhms,11,2) as time FROM t_wms_defective a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
ORDER BY sdate desc, ymdhms desc, barcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_defective a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'

SELECT NVL(sum(qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_defective a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sdate desc, itemcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.sdate, a.intf_yn, a.factory, c.subname_ch as car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) as qty FROM t_wms_defective a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.sdate, a.factory, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.intf_yn ) t ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY rn

SELECT a.sdate, a.intf_yn, a.factory, c.subname_ch as car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) as qty FROM t_wms_defective a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.sdate, a.factory, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.intf_yn ORDER BY a.sdate desc, a.itemcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_defective a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.sdate, a.factory, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.intf_yn )

SELECT sum(qty) FROM ( SELECT NVL(sum(a.qty), 0) as qty FROM t_wms_defective a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
)

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.INDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'Y' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END AS OKQTY, CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'N' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END AS NGQTY, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.BARCODE, A.MES_KEY, NVL(A.SOURCE2, 'EXCEPTION') AS SOURCE2, A.INVOICENO,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() TOTALQTY, SUM(CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'Y' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END) OVER () TOTALOKQTY, SUM(CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'N' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END) OVER () TOTALNGQTY FROM T_WMS_INBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION'
ORDER BY A.INDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY, SUM(X.okqty) OVER () AS TOTALOKQTY, SUM(X.ngqty) OVER () AS TOTALNGQTY FROM ( SELECT A.INDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'Y' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END) OKQTY, SUM(CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'N' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END) NGQTY FROM T_WMS_INBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION'
GROUP BY A.INDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME ) X ORDER BY X.INDATE DESC

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.MES_KEY, A.OUTDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'Y' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END AS OKQTY, CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'N' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END AS NGQTY, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.BARCODE, CASE WHEN A.INVOICENO = 'BARCODECOUNT' THEN 'STOCKCOUNT' ELSE A.SOURCE2 END AS SOURCE2, A.INVOICENO,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() TOTALQTY, SUM(CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'Y' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END) OVER () TOTALOKQTY, SUM(CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'N' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END) OVER () TOTALNGQTY FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LOADEXCEPTION'
ORDER BY A.OUTDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY, SUM(X.OKQTY) OVER () AS TOTALOKQTY, SUM(X.NGQTY) OVER () AS TOTALNGQTY FROM ( SELECT A.OUTDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'Y' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END) AS OKQTY, SUM(CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'N' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END) AS NGQTY FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LOADEXCEPTION'
GROUP BY A.OUTDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME ) X ORDER BY X.OUTDATE DESC

SELECT A.IID, A.SDATE, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, NVL(A.QTY, 0) AS QTY, NVL(A.OKQTY, 0) AS OKQTY, NVL(A.NGQTY, 0) AS NGQTY, A.LINE, A.SOURCE, A.SOURCE2, A.MAINCATEGORY, A.SUBCATEGORY, A.DETAILCATEGORY, A.JUDGMENT, A.CUSTNAME, A.MEMO, A.POSTYN, H.SUBNAME_CH AS UNIT, CASE WHEN A.YMDHMS IS NULL OR TRIM(A.YMDHMS) = '' THEN '' ELSE TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(A.YMDHMS, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) END AS HHMM, A.BARCODE, A.BARCODE2 AS DEFBARCODE,
/* ✅ totals (모든 줄에 동일하게 표시) */ SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER () AS TOTALQTY, SUM(NVL(A.OKQTY, 0)) OVER () AS TOTALOKQTY, SUM(NVL(A.NGQTY, 0)) OVER () AS TOTALNGQTY FROM T_WMS_INSPECTION A LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON B.CARNO = C.SUBCODE AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB H ON B.CMB_UNIT = H.SUBCODE AND H.TYPECODE = 'MI001' LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT UNPACKBARCODE FROM T_SCM_BARCODE ) D ON D.UNPACKBARCODE = A.BARCODE WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND UPPER(A.SOURCE) = 'PRODUCTION'
AND A.JUDGMENT NOT IN ('PENDIENTE')
ORDER BY A.YMDHMS DESC

SELECT A.IID, A.SDATE, A.ITEMCODE, B.SPEC, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, NVL(A.QTY, 0) AS QTY, A.SOURCE, A.SOURCE2, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.LOGINID, A.BARCODE, CASE WHEN A.YMDHMS IS NULL OR TRIM(A.YMDHMS) = '' THEN '' ELSE TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(A.YMDHMS, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) END AS YMDHMS, A.MES_KEY, A.INTF_YN, SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER () AS TOTALQTY, COUNT(*) OVER () AS TOTALCOUNT FROM T_WMS_INSPECTION A LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON B.CARNO = C.SUBCODE AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND UPPER(A.SOURCE) = 'RETURN'
ORDER BY A.YMDHMS DESC

SELECT A.IID, A.SDATE, A.ITEMCODE, B.SPEC, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, NVL(A.QTY, 0) AS QTY, A.SOURCE, A.SOURCE2, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.LOGINID, A.BARCODE, CASE WHEN A.YMDHMS IS NULL OR TRIM(A.YMDHMS) = '' THEN '' ELSE TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(A.YMDHMS, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) END AS YMDHMS, A.MES_KEY, A.INTF_YN, SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER () AS TOTALQTY, COUNT(*) OVER () AS TOTALCOUNT FROM T_WMS_INSPECTION A LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON B.CARNO = C.SUBCODE AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND UPPER(A.SOURCE) = 'STORAGE'
ORDER BY A.YMDHMS DESC

SELECT A.SDATE, A.ITEMCODE, B.SPEC, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, NVL(A.QTY, 0) AS QTY, A.SOURCE, A.SOURCE2, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.LOGINID, A.BARCODE, CASE WHEN A.YMDHMS IS NULL OR TRIM(A.YMDHMS) = '' THEN '' ELSE TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(A.YMDHMS, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) END AS YMDHMS, A.MES_KEY2 AS MES_KEY, A.INTF_YN2 AS INTF_YN, SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER () AS TOTALQTY, COUNT(*) OVER () AS TOTALCOUNT FROM T_WMS_INSPECTION A LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON B.CARNO = C.SUBCODE AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND UPPER(A.SOURCE2) IN ('SCRAP', 'RETURN')
ORDER BY A.YMDHMS DESC

SELECT X.SDATE, X.ITEMCODE, X.ITEMNAME, X.CAR, X.QTY, X.OKQTY, X.NGQTY, X.LINE, X.SOURCE, X.SOURCE2, X.MAINCATEGORY, X.SUBCATEGORY, X.DETAILCATEGORY, X.JUDGMENT, X.CUSTNAME, X.UNIT,
/* ✅ totals는 “그룹핑된 결과 기준” 총합 */ SUM(X.QTY) OVER () AS TOTALQTY, SUM(X.OKQTY) OVER () AS TOTALOKQTY, SUM(X.NGQTY) OVER () AS TOTALNGQTY FROM ( SELECT A.SDATE, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) AS QTY, SUM(NVL(A.OKQTY, 0)) AS OKQTY, SUM(NVL(A.NGQTY, 0)) AS NGQTY,
A.LINE, A.SOURCE, A.SOURCE2, A.MAINCATEGORY, A.SUBCATEGORY, A.DETAILCATEGORY, A.JUDGMENT, A.CUSTNAME, H.SUBNAME_CH AS UNIT FROM T_WMS_INSPECTION A LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON B.CARNO = C.SUBCODE AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB H ON B.CMB_UNIT = H.SUBCODE AND H.TYPECODE = 'MI001' LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT UNPACKBARCODE FROM T_SCM_BARCODE ) D ON D.UNPACKBARCODE = A.BARCODE WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y'
GROUP BY A.SDATE, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.LINE, A.SOURCE, A.SOURCE2, A.MAINCATEGORY, A.SUBCATEGORY, A.DETAILCATEGORY, A.JUDGMENT, A.CUSTNAME, H.SUBNAME_CH ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC, X.ITEMCODE

SELECT a.factory, a.storage, a.location, a.indate, a.car, a.itemcode, a.itemname, a.qty, a.barcode, a.ymdhms, a.loginid, a.hhmm, a.bdate, spec FROM ( SELECT a.factory, a.storage, a.location, a.indate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.barcode, a.ymdhms, a.loginid, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) AS hhmm, CASE WHEN INSTR(a.barcode, ',') > 0 THEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(a.barcode, '[^,]+', 1, 2)) ELSE '' END AS bdate, b.spec FROM t_wms_location a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
) a ORDER BY a.ymdhms desc, itemcode

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM t_wms_location a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
) t

SELECT sum(a.qty) FROM ( SELECT a.qty, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC) AS rn FROM t_wms_location a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
) a

SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT, -- 화면에 보이는 라인 수 SUM(t.QTY) AS TOTAL_QTY, -- 합계 재고수량 SUM(t.QTY) - SUM(t.NOQTY1) + SUM(t.NOQTY2) + SUM(t.UNPACKQTY) AS ERPQTY, -- ERP재고 계산식 SUM(t.NOQTY1) AS INQTY, -- 입고합 SUM(t.NOQTY2) AS OUTQTY, -- 출고합 SUM(t.UNPACKQTY) AS UNPACKQTY -- 언팩합 FROM ( SELECT FACTORY, CAR, ITEMCODE, ITEMNAME, SUM(QTY) AS QTY, MAX(in_if_x) AS NOQTY1, MAX(out_if_x) AS NOQTY2, MAX(unpack_qty) AS UNPACKQTY FROM ( SELECT factory, storage, car, itemcode, itemname, yyyymm, SUM(qty) AS qty, SUM(in_if_x) AS in_if_x, SUM(out_if_x) AS out_if_x, SUM(unpack_qty) AS unpack_qty FROM V_STOCKSUM WHERE 1 = 1
GROUP BY factory, storage, car, itemcode, itemname, yyyymm ) GROUP BY FACTORY, CAR, ITEMCODE, ITEMNAME ) t

SELECT A.INDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.WCCODE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'Y' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END AS OKQTY, CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'N' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END AS NGQTY, A.LOGINID, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.BARCODE, A.YMDHMS, A.SOURCE,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() TOTALQTY, SUM(CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'Y' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END) OVER() TOTALOKQTY, SUM(CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'N' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END) OVER() TOTALNGQTY FROM T_WMS_WORKMOVE A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y'
ORDER BY A.INDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.QTY) OVER() TOTALQTY, SUM(X.OKQTY) OVER() TOTALOKQTY, SUM(X.NGQTY) OVER() TOTALNGQTY FROM ( SELECT A.INDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.WCCODE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'Y' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END) OKQTY, SUM(CASE WHEN A.OKYN = 'N' THEN NVL(A.QTY, '0') ELSE '0' END) NGQTY FROM T_WMS_WORKMOVE A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y'
GROUP BY A.INDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.WCCODE, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME ) X ORDER BY X.INDATE DESC

WITH RS AS ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn_barcode FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.sdate = #{searchParams.sdate} ) WHERE rn_barcode = 1 ) SELECT a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty))) AS qty, SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(o.labeltype, 'NORMAL') != 'Defective' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty)) ELSE 0 END) AS ok, SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(o.labeltype, 'NORMAL') = 'Defective' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty)) ELSE 0 END) AS ng, b.spec, /* ✅ totals는 “그룹핑된 결과 기준” 총합 */ SUM(SUM(TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty)))) OVER () AS totalqty, SUM(SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(o.labeltype, 'NORMAL') != 'Defective' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty)) ELSE 0 END)) OVER () AS totalok, SUM(SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(o.labeltype, 'NORMAL') = 'Defective' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty)) ELSE 0 END)) OVER () AS totalng FROM RS a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN t_scm_barcode o ON o.barcode = a.barcode WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec ORDER BY a.itemcode

WITH RS AS ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY r.barcode ORDER BY r.sdate DESC, r.ymdhms DESC ) AS rn_barcode FROM t_wms_realstock r WHERE r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.sdate = #{searchParams.sdate} ) WHERE rn_barcode = 1 ) SELECT a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty))) AS qty, SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(o.labeltype, 'NORMAL') != 'Defective' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty)) ELSE 0 END) AS ok, SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(o.labeltype, 'NORMAL') = 'Defective' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty)) ELSE 0 END) AS ng, b.spec, /* ✅ totals는 “그룹핑된 결과 기준” 총합 */ SUM(SUM(TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty)))) OVER () AS totalqty, SUM(SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(o.labeltype, 'NORMAL') != 'Defective' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty)) ELSE 0 END)) OVER () AS totalok, SUM(SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(o.labeltype, 'NORMAL') = 'Defective' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(a.qty)) ELSE 0 END)) OVER () AS totalng FROM RS a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON a.itemcode = b.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON b.carno = c.subcode AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN t_scm_barcode o ON o.barcode = a.barcode WHERE 1=1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LASTDAY'
GROUP BY a.factory, a.sdate, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, b.spec ORDER BY a.itemcode

SELECT LEVEL AS LVL, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.CHILDCODE, C.ITEMNAME AS CHILDNAME, A.QTYPER FROM T_MI_MBOMSTR A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM C ON A.CHILDCODE = C.ITEMCODE START WITH A.ITEMCODE = #{itemcode} CONNECT BY PRIOR A.CHILDCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER SIBLINGS BY A.CHILDCODE
select count(*) from t_wms_worklocation where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y'
select count(*) from t_wms_location where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y' and storage = 'REDCAGE'
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_workmove ( indate, barcode, itemcode, roomcode, loginid, ymdhms, qty, source, factory, storage, wccode, okyn ) values( TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{barcode}, #{itemcode}, #{factory}||'-'||#{storage}, #{loginid}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{qty}, #{source}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{factory}||'-'||#{wstorage}, #{okyn} )
mapper.update: update t_wms_location set useyn = 'N', ymdhms_d = to_char(sysdate,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), memo_d = 'DECOMPOSITION' where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y'
update t_wms_worklocation set useyn = 'N', ymdhms_d = to_char(sysdate,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), memo_d = 'DECOMPOSITION' where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_decomposition ( barcode, sdate, ymdhms, itemcode, childcode, qty, factory, wccode, loginid, basicqty, scrapqty, maxqty, source ) values ( #{barcode}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'), to_char(sysdate,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{itemcode}, #{childcode}, #{qty}, #{factory}, #{wstorage}, #{loginid}, #{basicqty}, #{scrapqty}, #{maxqty}, #{source} )
mapper.select: select factory, qty from t_wms_location where barcode = #{barcode} and useyn = 'Y'
mapper.update: update t_wms_inspection set postyn ='Y' where useyn = 'Y' and barcode2 = #{barcode}

UPDATE T_WMS_LOCATION SET USEYN = 'N' , YMDHMS_D = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , MEMO_D = 'SCRAP' , LOGINID_D = #{loginid} WHERE BARCODE = #{barcode} AND SOURCE = 'INSPECTION' AND USEYN = 'Y'
UPDATE T_SCM_BARCODE SET USEYN = 'N' , USEYNREMARK = 'SCRAP' , USEYN_YMDHMS = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , laststatus = 100 WHERE BARCODE = #{barcode}
mapper.select:
SELECT A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.WCCODE, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.CHILDCODE, B2.ITEMNAME AS CHILDNAME, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.QTY, A.BARCODE, A.LOGINID, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, '0')) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_DECOMPOSITION A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B2 ON B2.ITEMCODE = A.CHILDCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.QTY <> '0' AND A.SOURCE = 'DECOMPOSITION'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.ITEMCODE

SELECT A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.WCCODE, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.CHILDCODE, B2.ITEMNAME AS CHILDNAME, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.SCRAPQTY AS QTY, A.BARCODE, A.LOGINID, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, '0')) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_DECOMPOSITION A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B2 ON B2.ITEMCODE = A.CHILDCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SCRAPQTY <> '0'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.ITEMCODE

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.FACTORY,
A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.SOURCE, /* HOLD */ SUM( CASE WHEN NVL(UPPER(TRIM(A.JUDGMENT)), ' ') = 'PENDIENTE' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(A.QTY) DEFAULT 0 ON CONVERSION ERROR) ELSE 0 END ) AS HOLD_QTY,
/* NON HOLD */ SUM( CASE WHEN NVL(UPPER(TRIM(A.JUDGMENT)), ' ') <> 'PENDIENTE' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(A.QTY) DEFAULT 0 ON CONVERSION ERROR) ELSE 0 END ) AS NONHOLD_QTY,
/* HOLD - NONHOLD */ SUM( CASE WHEN NVL(UPPER(TRIM(A.JUDGMENT)), ' ') = 'PENDIENTE' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(A.QTY) DEFAULT 0 ON CONVERSION ERROR) ELSE 0 END ) - SUM( CASE WHEN NVL(UPPER(TRIM(A.JUDGMENT)), ' ') <> 'PENDIENTE' THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(A.QTY) DEFAULT 0 ON CONVERSION ERROR) ELSE 0 END ) AS QTY
FROM T_WMS_INSPECTION A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON B.CARNO = C.SUBCODE AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y'
AND UPPER(TRIM(A.SOURCE)) IN ('PRODUCTION','RETURN')
AND UPPER(TRIM(A.SOURCE)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{searchParams.source}))
AND UPPER(TRIM(A.SOURCE)) IN ('PRODUCTION','RETURN')
GROUP BY
A.FACTORY, A.ITEMCODE, A.SOURCE, B.ITEMNAME, C.SUBNAME_CH ) WHERE QTY > 0 ORDER BY
ITEMCODE
select NVL(MAX(barcode), 0) AS barcode from t_scm_barcode_max where madate = to_char(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') and pno = #{itemcode}
mapper.update: update t_scm_barcode_max set barcode = ${seq} where madate = to_char(sysdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') and pno = #{itemcode}
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_inspection ( sdate, ymdhms, itemcode, itemname, barcode, qty, okqty, ngqty, line, maincategory, subcategory, detailcategory, judgment, responsibility,custcode, custname, memo, factory, storage, loginid , source, source2, okyn, BARCODE2, source3 ) values( #{date}, to_char(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{itemcode}, #{itemname}, #{newbarcode}, #{scanQty}, #{okQty}, #{ngQty}, #{line}, #{mainCategory}, #{subCategory}, #{detailCategory}, #{judgment}, #{responsibility}, #{custcode}, #{custname}, #{comment}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{loginid}, #{source}, #{judgment}, #{okyn}, #{newbarcode}, 'WMS' )
mapper.select: select cu_code as custcode , cu_sangho as custname from c_cust where cu_code in (select custcode from t_mi_price_buycust) ORDER BY CU_SANGHO
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_workmove ( indate, barcode, itemcode, roomcode, loginid, ymdhms, qty, source, factory, storage, wccode, okyn ) values( #{date}, #{barcode}, #{itemcode}, #{factory}||'-'||#{storage}, #{loginid}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{qty}, #{source}, UPPER(#{factory}), #{storage}, #{factory}||'-'||#{wstorage}, #{okyn} )
mapper.select: /*재사용에서 사용*/ SELECT DISTINCT A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.CHILDCODE, C.ITEMNAME AS CHILDNAME, A.QTYPER FROM T_MI_MBOMSTR A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM C ON A.CHILDCODE = C.ITEMCODE WHERE A.ITEMCODE = #{itemcode}
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_inspection ( sdate, ymdhms, itemcode, itemname, barcode, qty, okqty, ngqty, line, maincategory, subcategory, detailcategory, judgment, responsibility,custcode, custname, memo, factory, storage, loginid , source, source2, okyn, BARCODE2, POSTYN, SOURCE3 ) values( #{date}, to_char(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{itemcode}, #{itemname}, #{barcode}, #{scanQty}, #{okQty}, #{ngQty}, #{line}, #{mainCategory}, #{subCategory}, #{detailCategory}, #{judgment}, #{responsibility}, #{custcode}, #{custname}, #{comment}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{loginid}, #{source}, #{judgment}, #{okyn}, #{newbarcode}, 'Y', 'WMS' )
mapper.select:
SELECT A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.WCCODE, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.CHILDCODE, B2.ITEMNAME AS CHILDNAME, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.QTY, A.BARCODE, A.LOGINID, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, '0')) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_DECOMPOSITION A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B2 ON B2.ITEMCODE = A.CHILDCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'REUSED'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.ITEMCODE

SELECT V.*, SUM(V.TOTAL_QTY) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT a.ITEMCODE, b.ITEMNAME, /* 1. INVENTORY */ SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'INVENTORY' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS INVENTORY_QTY, /* 2. WORKMOVE TOREDCAGE */ SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'QW TOREDCAGE' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS QW_TOREDCAGE_QTY, /* 3. WORKMOVE FROMREDCAGE */ SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'QW FROMREDCAGE' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS QW_FROMREDCAGE_QTY, /* 4.STORAGE TOREDCAGE */ SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'QS TOREDCAGE' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS QS_TOREDCAGE_QTY, /* 5. STORAGE FROMREDCAGE */ SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'QS FROMREDCAGE' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS QS_FROMREDCAGE_QTY, /* 6. SCRAP */ SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'SCRAP' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS SCRAP_QTY, /* ▶ TOTAL (전부 합계) */ SUM(PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY) AS TOTAL_QTY FROM V_WORKSTOCK a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item B ON A.ITEMCODE = B.ITEMCODE WHERE 1 = 1
GROUP BY A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME ) V ORDER BY V.ITEMCODE
